suites.label: Action economy: 3-action budget, reaction availability, per-turn reset, and free-action costs
checks: Character starts turn with actions_remaining=3 and reaction_available=true
Three-action activity decrements actions_remaining by 3 and disallows further actions
Reaction consumes reaction_available; second reaction in same turn is rejected
Free action does not consume actions_remaining
Actions reset to 3 and reaction reset to true on new-turn event
Attempting action when actions_remaining=0 returns error
Quickened condition grants +1 action (actions_remaining starts at 4)
Stunned N removes N actions at turn start and decrements stun counter
